content.description: No code changes required. The build-loop/continuous-operation requirement has status 'deprecated' and is superseded by audit-loop/reconciliation and build-loop/reconciliation. The assessment was stale (projectCommit 4e49920 predates current HEAD 91cfe5c). The current implementation in bin/build-loop.sh and bin/audit-loop.sh fully implements the reconciliation-based approach that replaces this deprecated requirement.
